series_metadata.series_title: Invoices received for financial services pertaining to investment accounts.
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of invoices outlining fees billed to the Treasurer for financial services pertaining to the maintenance of investment accounts and purchase of daily pricing information on investment securities. Attached to the invoices are supporting documents that are used to reconcile invoiced fees to services actually provided to the Treasurer.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years. ; Electronic: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
